sourceOverview.notes: TTS: PlayHT 3.0. Voice cloning, 140+ languages. Good for content creation.

activeModelsSummary.tts:
PlayDialog Turbo [PlayDialog-turbo]
PlayHT TTS API [tts] — Voice-based model/engine selection beyond Turbo

audit.priceRangeSummary: Plan-based/pricing-page driven. Official site markets a free version for limited testing.
audit.limitsSummary: Rate limits depend on plan/API. Public docs are more voice-centric than model-centric; voice IDs matter more than engine IDs.
audit.regionSummary: PlayHT cloud; region details limited in public docs.
audit.ttsLanguagesSummary: 30+ to 40+ languages depending on marketing page/version.
audit.appIntegrationNotes: Use voice IDs plus engine selection. Public docs clearly show Dialog Turbo, but broader engine naming is less standardized than some competitors.

supplementalResearch.title: 45. PlayHT (US) — ⛔ SHUT DOWN
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 45. PlayHT (US) — ⛔ SHUT DOWN

**Status:** Acquired by Meta (July 2025). API offline July 26, 2025. Services permanently shut down December 31, 2025. **Remove from all integration plans.** Replacements: ElevenLabs, Cartesia, Fish Audio, LMNT.
